---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or effect for fast_image_editor
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include API examples:

```dart
// How you imagine using the feature
final result = await FastImageEditor.applyEffect(
  imageBytes,
  effect: Effect.newEffect(intensity: 0.5),
  region: Region.circle(center: Offset(100, 100), radius: 50),
);
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples from other image editing libraries.
